name: Toon Blast Puzzle
description: Welcome to Toon Blast Puzzle, a fun match-3 adventure full of color, strategy, and exciting challenges. Blast vibrant cubes, solve clever puzzles, and enjoy a relaxing journey through a world packed with entertaining levels and satisfying gameplay. Each stage offers a new brain-teasing experience, combining simple controls with addictive puzzle action.
instructions: Use the touch or mouse to play
